_: Starter canonical dag-cbor vectors (value -> hex of canonical bytes). FMT-1 seed; extend from the IPLD test suite when online. Any conformant encoder must reproduce these exactly.
rules: map keys sorted by length then bytewise; string keys only
definite lengths only; no duplicate keys; minimal-width integers
floats always 8-byte (major 7, ai 27), canonical bit patterns; no NaN/Inf
links: tag 42 over the CID bytes with multibase identity prefix 0x00
